pageHeader.title: Membership
pageHeader.subtitle: Support Mahabharata Scholarship
pageHeader.description: Join our membership community to support ongoing research and gain access to exclusive content, resources, and direct engagement with Varun Gupta.

tiers.name: Free
tiers.description: Basic access to public content and resources.
features: Access to all public articles and research papers

tiers.name: Supporter
tiers.description: For dedicated readers who want deeper access and to support the work.
features: Monthly live Q&A sessions with Varun

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.description: For serious scholars and enthusiasts seeking comprehensive access and direct collaboration.
features: Full course access (all modules and materials)
Exclusive book chapter drafts and manuscripts
Direct messaging with Varun for research queries
Discount on all books and merchandise (20%)

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can change your membership tier at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, and downgrades apply at the start of the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Is there a yearly billing option?
faq.answer: Yes, both Supporter and Premium plans are available with yearly billing at a discounted rate — Supporter at $90/year and Premium at $290/year.

faq.question: Can I cancel my membership?
faq.answer: You can cancel anytime. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period, after which your account reverts to the Free tier.

faq.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) as well as PayPal. Indian users can also pay via UPI and Net Banking.

faq.question: Is my subscription tax-deductible?
faq.answer: Currently, membership subscriptions are not tax-deductible. However, we are in the process of establishing a non-profit research foundation.

faq.question: Do you offer student or academic discounts?
faq.answer: Yes, verified students and academic researchers can contact us for discounted Premium access at $15/month. Please email with your institutional email ID.

faq.question: How do I access exclusive content?
faq.answer: Once you subscribe, log into your account and navigate to the Members Area. All exclusive content will be tagged and accessible from your dashboard.

faq.question: Can I gift a membership to someone else?
faq.answer: Absolutely! You can purchase a gift membership from the pricing page. The recipient will receive an email with instructions to activate their membership.

seo.title: Membership | Support Mahabharata Research | Varun Gupta
seo.description: Join Varun Gupta's membership community to support Mahabharata scholarship. Access exclusive research, courses, live Q&A, and more. Plans from free to premium.
